use tokio::task;

async fn process_item(id: u64) -> String {
    format!("processed_{}", id)
}

async fn process_batch(items: Vec<u64>) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut handles = Vec::new();
    for id in items {
        // BAD: unbounded spawn per item with no backpressure
        let handle = task::spawn(process_item(id));
        handles.push(handle);
    }

    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for handle in handles {
        results.push(handle.await.unwrap());
    }
    results
}
